name: Serneke Group AB (publ)
summary: Serneke Group AB (publ) operates as a construction company primarily in the regions of Gothenburg, Stockholm, and Malm√É¬∂. The company operates through Construction, Civil Engineering, and Project Development segments. It is involved in the construction of housing, commercial, and public properties. The company also undertakes earth, foundation, infrastructure, electrical grid, power plant, harbor contract, industrial, earth and excavation, and concrete project works. In addition, it engages in the acquisition, development, and sale of land for residential and commercial properties. Further, the company provides property management services. It serves municipal and private property, state-owned, project development, and industrial companies; central government, municipalities, and county councils; and authorities and developers of commercial centers. Serneke Group AB (publ) was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.
